audit_status.source_base: Greek 2 John text tradition, draft aligned to public-domain comparison layer later
audit_status.review_note: Complete one-chapter draft reviewed for elder/elect lady, truth and love, commandment, discernment, hospitality boundaries.

verses.restored: The elder to the chosen lady and her children, whom I love in truth, and not I only but also all those knowing the truth,
because of the truth remaining in us and being with us into the age.
Grace, mercy, peace will be with us from Divine Father and from Jesus Messiah, the Son of the Father, in truth and love.
I rejoiced greatly because I have found some of your children walking in truth, just as command we received from the Father.
And now I ask you, lady, not as writing to you a new command but one we had from beginning: that we love one another.
And this is love: that we walk according to his commands. This is the command, just as you heard from beginning, so that you may walk in it.
Because many misleading teachers went out into the world-system, those not confessing Jesus Messiah coming in flesh; this is the misleading and opposing-Messiah pattern.
Look to yourselves, so that you may not lose what we worked for, but may receive full reward.
Everyone going ahead and not remaining in the teaching of Messiah does not have the Divine; the one remaining in the teaching has both the Father and the Son.
If anyone comes to you and does not bring this teaching, do not receive this one into house, and do not say to this one greeting.
For the one saying greeting to this one participates in that one's harmful works.
Having many things to write to you, I did not intend through paper and ink, but I hope to come to you and speak mouth to mouth, so that our joy may be made full.
The children of your chosen sister greet you.

translation_notes: Chosen lady may be a woman leader/host or a personified assembly; ambiguity is preserved.
Truth and love are inseparable; boundaries in hospitality concern harmful teaching, not fear of outsiders.
Opposing-Messiah language must not be used as paranoia or modern target-mapping.
